title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/ocicrypt to v1.1.8

comments.body: @lsm5 Is there a trick to re-run the failing Packit build, please? Clicking the GitHub Re-run button at https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2080/checks?check_run_id=15910422919 seems to have had no effect.
@mtrmac @cevich mentioned somewhere else about github UI issues. Maybe that's what's to blame for this.

I hit a retrigger on the copr itself at https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/rhcontainerbot/packit-builds/build/6292181/ . Anyway, I can't quite tell why it failed and given that x86_64 c9s was successful, feel free to ignore the failure and move on.
The retriggered build will show up here: https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/rhcontainerbot/packit-builds/build/6300081/ Can't say if the packit task will become green though.
The retriggered build succeeded (and is now visible in the GitHub UI). Thanks @lsm5 !

> Maybe that's what's to blame for this.

Highly likely.  Any outage affecting generation/delivery/reception of Github WebHooks will impact all github-actions and github-apps (like Cirrus or packit or others.)
